# WaveSync - UI/UX Design System

> Complete design system specification for a premium, dark-first music player.

---

## 1. Design Philosophy

**WaveSync's UI should feel like it was designed by a team at Spotify, not generated by AI.** Every pixel should be intentional. The design is dark-first, content-focused, and rhythm-aware — the UI itself should feel musical.

### Principles
1. **Content Over Chrome** — Album art and waveforms are the heroes. UI elements recede
2. **Purposeful Motion** — Every animation communicates state change. Nothing moves for decoration
3. **Touch-First Precision** — Design for thumbs first, refine for mouse precision
4. **Spatial Audio** — Use depth (shadows, blur, layers) to create hierarchy
5. **Silence is Golden** — White space is not empty space. It creates focus

---

## 2. Color System

### 2.1 Core Palette

```
Background Scale (darkest to lightest):
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ bg-primary      #0A0A0F   rgb(10, 10, 15)       │  Main background
│ bg-secondary    #12121A   rgb(18, 18, 26)       │  Cards, panels
│ bg-tertiary     #1A1A28   rgb(26, 26, 40)       │  Elevated surfaces
│ bg-elevated     #222236   rgb(34, 34, 54)       │  Hover states, dropdowns
│ bg-overlay       #2A2A44   rgb(42, 42, 68)       │  Modals, tooltips
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Text Scale:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ text-primary    #EDEDF0   rgb(237, 237, 240)    │  Headings, primary text
│ text-secondary  #A0A0B8   rgb(160, 160, 184)    │  Body text, descriptions
│ text-tertiary   #6B6B84   rgb(107, 107, 132)    │  Muted, timestamps
│ text-disabled   #44445C   rgb(68, 68, 92)       │  Disabled states
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Accent Colors:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ accent-primary  #6366F1   rgb(99, 102, 241)     │  Indigo - primary actions
│ accent-hover    #818CF8   rgb(129, 140, 248)    │  Indigo lighter - hover
│ accent-active   #4F46E5   rgb(79, 70, 229)     │  Indigo darker - active/pressed
│ accent-glow     #6366F133  rgba(99,102,241,0.2) │  Glow effects
│ accent-cyan     #22D3EE   rgb(34, 211, 238)    │  Visualization accent
│ accent-emerald  #34D399   rgb(52, 211, 153)    │  Success, active states
│ accent-rose     #FB7185   rgb(251, 113, 133)   │  Errors, destructive
│ accent-amber    #FBBF24   rgb(251, 191, 36)    │  Warnings, highlights
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Visualization Gradient:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ viz-start       #6366F1   Indigo (bass)         │
│ viz-mid         #22D3EE   Cyan (mids)           │
│ viz-end         #34D399   Emerald (treble)      │
│ viz-glow        #6366F144  Indigo glow          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Borders & Separators:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ border-subtle   #1E1E30   rgb(30, 30, 48)      │  Subtle dividers
│ border-default  #2A2A44   rgb(42, 42, 68)      │  Default borders
│ border-hover    #3A3A58   rgb(58, 58, 88)      │  Hover borders
│ border-focus    #6366F1   rgb(99, 102, 241)    │  Focus rings
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2.2 Tailwind CSS Configuration

```ts
// tailwind.config.ts
const config = {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        surface: {
          primary: '#0A0A0F',
          secondary: '#12121A',
          tertiary: '#1A1A28',
          elevated: '#222236',
          overlay: '#2A2A44',
        },
        content: {
          primary: '#EDEDF0',
          secondary: '#A0A0B8',
          tertiary: '#6B6B84',
          disabled: '#44445C',
        },
        accent: {
          DEFAULT: '#6366F1',
          hover: '#818CF8',
          active: '#4F46E5',
          glow: 'rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2)',
          cyan: '#22D3EE',
          emerald: '#34D399',
          rose: '#FB7185',
          amber: '#FBBF24',
        },
        border: {
          subtle: '#1E1E30',
          DEFAULT: '#2A2A44',
          hover: '#3A3A58',
          focus: '#6366F1',
        },
      },
    },
  },
}
```

### 2.3 Color Usage Rules

| Context | Token | Example |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Page background | `bg-surface-primary` | Main app background |
| Card/panel background | `bg-surface-secondary` | Playlist panel, now playing card |
| Interactive element bg | `bg-surface-tertiary` | Buttons, inputs |
| Hover state | `bg-surface-elevated` | Button hover |
| Primary text | `text-content-primary` | Track title, headings |
| Secondary text | `text-content-secondary` | Artist name, descriptions |
| Muted text | `text-content-tertiary` | Duration, timestamp |
| Primary button | `bg-accent` | Play button fill |
| Active/playing indicator | `accent-emerald` | Now playing dot |
| Error state | `accent-rose` | Failed to load |
| Progress bar fill | `accent` → `accent-cyan` | Gradient fill |
| Visualization | `viz-start` → `viz-end` | Frequency bars gradient |

---

## 3. Typography

### 3.1 Font Stack

```css
/* Primary: Inter — clean, modern, excellent for UI */
--font-primary: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;

/* Monospace: JetBrains Mono — for timestamps, frequency values */
--font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace;
```

### 3.2 Type Scale

```
Display       32px / 40px / -0.02em / 700    → App title, hero text
Heading 1     24px / 32px / -0.01em / 700    → Section headers
Heading 2     20px / 28px / -0.01em / 600    → Panel titles
Heading 3     16px / 24px /  0.00em / 600    → Card titles
Body Large    16px / 24px /  0.00em / 400    → Primary body text
Body          14px / 20px /  0.00em / 400    → Default body text
Body Small    13px / 18px /  0.01em / 400    → Secondary info
Caption       12px / 16px /  0.02em / 500    → Timestamps, labels
Overline      11px / 16px /  0.08em / 600    → Section labels (uppercase)
Mono          13px / 18px /  0.00em / 400    → Time display, freq values
```

### 3.3 Tailwind Typography Classes

```html
<!-- Display -->
<h1 class="text-[32px] leading-10 tracking-tight font-bold text-content-primary">

<!-- Heading 1 -->
<h2 class="text-2xl leading-8 tracking-tight font-bold text-content-primary">

<!-- Body -->
<p class="text-sm leading-5 text-content-secondary">

<!-- Caption -->
<span class="text-xs leading-4 tracking-wide font-medium text-content-tertiary">

<!-- Overline -->
<span class="text-[11px] leading-4 tracking-widest font-semibold uppercase text-content-tertiary">

<!-- Mono (time) -->
<span class="font-mono text-[13px] leading-[18px] text-content-tertiary tabular-nums">
```

---

## 4. Spacing System

### 4.1 Base Unit: 4px

```
Space Scale:
0.5   →  2px    → Micro gaps (icon-to-text inline)
1     →  4px    → Tight padding (badges, chips)
1.5   →  6px    → Compact padding
2     →  8px    → Default inline spacing
3     →  12px   → Small gaps between elements
4     →  16px   → Default padding, standard gap
5     →  20px   → Medium padding
6     →  24px   → Section padding
8     →  32px   → Large section gaps
10    →  40px   → Major section spacing
12    →  48px   → Page-level spacing
16    →  64px   → Hero spacing
20    →  80px   → Maximum spacing
```

### 4.2 Component Spacing Rules

| Context | Spacing |
|---------|---------|
| Button padding | `px-4 py-2` (16px / 8px) |
| Card padding | `p-4` (16px) or `p-6` (24px) |
| Section gap | `gap-6` (24px) or `gap-8` (32px) |
| List item padding | `px-4 py-3` (16px / 12px) |
| Icon to text | `gap-2` (8px) or `gap-3` (12px) |
| Input padding | `px-3 py-2` (12px / 8px) |
| Modal padding | `p-6` (24px) |
| Page padding | `px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8` |

---

When mini player is tapped, expands to full screen:

```

│  ┌────────────────────────┐  │
│  │  ▼ Collapse    •••     │  │  ← Header with collapse & more
│  └────────────────────────┘  │
│                               │
│         ┌──────────┐         │
│         │          │         │
│         │          │         │
│         │  ALBUM   │         │
│         │  ART     │         │  ← Large album art (280x280)
│         │          │         │
│         │          │         │
│         └──────────┘         │
│                               │
│  ┌────────────────────────┐  │
│  │    VISUALIZATION       │  │  ← Small viz strip
│  └────────────────────────┘  │
│                               │
│    Track Title                │  ← Song info
│    Artist Name                │
│                               │
│  ═══════════●═══════════════  │  ← Waveform progress bar
│  1:23                  3:42  │
│                               │
│         ◄◄    ▶▶    ►►       │  ← Large controls
│                               │
│     🔀    🔁    🔊    📋     │  ← Secondary controls
│                               │
└──────────────────────────────┘
```

## 6. Component Specifications

### 6.1 Buttons

**Primary Button (Play)**
```
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ Size: 48x48px (desktop) │
│       56x56px (mobile)  │
│ Shape: Circle            │
│ Fill: accent (#6366F1)   │
│ Icon: Play/Pause (20px)  │
│ Hover: accent-hover      │
│ Active: accent-active    │
│ Transition: 150ms ease   │
│ Shadow: 0 0 20px glow    │
└─────────────────────────┘
```

**Secondary Button (Prev/Next)**
```
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ Size: 36x36px            │
│ Shape: Circle            │
│ Fill: transparent        │
│ Icon: 18px, text-secondary│
│ Hover: bg-surface-tertiary│
│ Active: bg-surface-elevated│
│ Transition: 150ms ease    │
└─────────────────────────┘
```

**Ghost Button (Shuffle/Repeat)**
```
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ Size: 32x32px            │
│ Shape: Rounded (8px)     │
│ Fill: transparent        │
│ Icon: 16px               │
│ Color: text-tertiary     │
│ Active: accent (+ dot)   │
│ Hover: bg-surface-tertiary│
└─────────────────────────┘
```

### 6.2 Progress Bar

```
Full width of player area
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Height: 4px (default), 6px (hover)               │
│ Background: surface-tertiary                     │
│ Fill: linear-gradient(90deg, accent, accent-cyan)│
│ Buffer: surface-elevated (20% opacity)           │
│ Thumb: 12px circle, accent, hidden by default    │
│ Thumb: appears on hover, draggable               │
│ Hover: show time tooltip above cursor             │
│ Transition: height 200ms ease                     │
│ Hit area: 20px tall (invisible, for easy clicking)│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Hover State:
    ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
    │                   2:34                      │  ← Tooltip
    │         ─────────●──────────────            │  ← Expanded bar
    │                                             │
    └────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 6.3 Volume Slider

```
Desktop:
┌──────────────────────────┐
│ 🔊 icon + horizontal bar │
│ Bar width: 80px           │
│ Bar height: 4px           │
│ Fill: content-primary      │
│ Thumb: 10px circle         │
│ Hover: expands to 6px     │
│ Scroll: mousewheel changes│
└──────────────────────────┘

Mobile:
┌──────────────────────────┐
│ 🔊 icon only (tap to show)│
│ Vertical slider appears    │
│ Slides up from icon        │
│ Height: 100px             │
│ Auto-hides after 2s       │
└──────────────────────────┘
```

Desktop (sidebar):
┌────────────────────────────┐
│  ┌──────────────────────┐  │

│  │     (rounded-xl)     │  │  shadow-2xl

│  │                      │  │
│  └──────────────────────┘  │

│  Album Name                 │  caption, content-tertiary
│                             │
│  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │  FREQ ANALYZER       │  │  6 bands
│  │  ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██   │  │  colored bars
│  └──────────────────────┘  │
│                             │

│  Padding: 24px              │

### 6.6 Visualization Canvas

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                            │
│  ████ ████                    ████                         │
│  ████ ████ ████          ████ ████                         │
│  ████ ████ ████ ████     ████ ████ ████                    │
│  ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████         │
│  ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████ ████    │
│                                                            │
│  Width: 100% of container                                  │
│  Height: 200px (desktop), 120px (tablet), 80px (mobile)   │
│  Background: transparent (overlays surface-primary)        │
│  Bar colors: gradient from viz-start to viz-end            │
│  Bar width: calculated (container / binCount * 2.5)        │
│  Bar gap: 1px                                              │
│  Bar radius: 2px top corners                               │
│  Reflection: 30% opacity mirror below                      │
│  Glow: subtle box-shadow on bars                           │
│                                                            │
│  Canvas resolution: width * devicePixelRatio               │
│  Rendering: requestAnimationFrame loop                     │
│  Paused state: bars smoothly decay to zero                 │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 7. Animation Specifications

### 7.1 Micro-interactions

| Element | Trigger | Animation | Duration | Easing |
|---------|---------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Play button | Click | Scale 0.9 → 1.0 | 150ms | ease-out |
| Play → Pause icon | Toggle | Morph/crossfade | 200ms | ease-in-out |
| Track hover | Mouseenter | bg opacity 0 → 1 | 150ms | ease-out |
| Volume slider | Hover | Height 4px → 6px | 200ms | ease-out |
| Progress thumb | Hover | Opacity 0 → 1, scale 0 → 1 | 200ms | spring |
| Shuffle/Repeat active | Toggle | Color transition + subtle scale | 200ms | ease-out |
| Album art load | Image ready | Opacity 0 → 1 + scale 0.95 → 1 | 400ms | ease-out |
| Track change | New track | Slide up + fade in | 300ms | ease-out |
| Queue add | Add click | Slide in from right | 250ms | spring |
| Toast notification | Appear | Slide up + fade in | 250ms | spring |
| Toast notification | Dismiss | Slide right + fade out | 200ms | ease-in |

### 7.2 Layout Transitions

| Transition | Animation | Duration | Library |
|-----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| Mini → Full player | Height expand + content fade | 400ms | Framer Motion `layout` |
| Sidebar show/hide | Width 0 ↔ 240px + fade | 300ms | Framer Motion |
| Playlist reorder | Smooth Y position swap | 200ms | Framer Motion `Reorder` |
| Route change | Fade + slight Y shift | 200ms | Framer Motion `AnimatePresence` |
| Modal open | Scale 0.95 → 1 + overlay fade | 200ms | Framer Motion |
| Modal close | Scale 1 → 0.95 + overlay fade | 150ms | Framer Motion |

### 7.3 Framer Motion Variants

```tsx
// Page transition
const pageVariants = {
  initial: { opacity: 0, y: 8 },
  animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' } },
  exit: { opacity: 0, y: -8, transition: { duration: 0.15, ease: 'easeIn' } },
}

// Stagger children (track list)
const listVariants = {
  animate: { transition: { staggerChildren: 0.04 } },
}
const itemVariants = {
  initial: { opacity: 0, x: -8 },
  animate: { opacity: 1, x: 0 },
}

// Scale on press (play button)
const playButtonVariants = {
  tap: { scale: 0.9 },
  hover: { scale: 1.05 },
}

// Equalizer bars (now playing indicator)
const equalizerBarVariants = {
  playing: (i: number) => ({
    height: ['40%', '80%', '60%', '90%', '50%'],
    transition: {
      duration: 0.8,
      repeat: Infinity,
      repeatType: 'reverse',
      delay: i * 0.1,
      ease: 'easeInOut',
    },
  }),
  paused: { height: '20%', transition: { duration: 0.3 } },
}
```

### 7.4 Reduced Motion

```css
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  * {
    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
  }
}
```

```tsx
// In Framer Motion
const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches

<motion.div
  animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
  transition={prefersReducedMotion ? { duration: 0 } : { duration: 0.3 }}
/>
```

---

## 8. Iconography

### 8.1 Icon Library: Lucide React

| Action | Icon Name | Size |
|--------|-----------|------|
| Play | `Play` (filled) | 20px |
| Pause | `Pause` (filled) | 20px |
| Skip Next | `SkipForward` | 18px |
| Skip Previous | `SkipBack` | 18px |
| Shuffle | `Shuffle` | 16px |
| Repeat | `Repeat` | 16px |
| Repeat One | `Repeat1` | 16px |
| Volume High | `Volume2` | 18px |
| Volume Low | `Volume1` | 18px |
| Volume Mute | `VolumeX` | 18px |
| Queue | `ListMusic` | 18px |
| More | `MoreHorizontal` | 18px |
| Search | `Search` | 18px |
| Home | `Home` | 18px |
| Library | `Library` | 18px |
| Settings | `Settings` | 18px |
| Close | `X` | 18px |
| Expand | `ChevronUp` | 18px |
| Collapse | `ChevronDown` | 18px |
| Heart/Like | `Heart` | 16px |
| Fullscreen | `Maximize2` | 16px |

### 8.2 Icon Styling

```
Default:    text-content-tertiary, stroke-width: 1.5
Hover:      text-content-secondary
Active:     text-accent
Disabled:   text-content-disabled
Size:       Consistent within groups (controls: 18px, nav: 18px)
```

---

## 9. Shadows & Elevation

```
Elevation 0 (flat):      none
Elevation 1 (card):      0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)
Elevation 2 (dropdown):  0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)
Elevation 3 (modal):     0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)
Elevation 4 (tooltip):   0 20px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 8px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)

Album Art Shadow:         0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)
Glow Effect:             0 0 40px rgba(99,102,241,0.15)
Player Bar Shadow:        0 -4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)
```

---

## 10. Border Radius

```
None:       0px     → Progress bar track
Small:      4px     → Badges, chips
Default:    8px     → Buttons, inputs, small cards
Medium:     12px    → Cards, panels
Large:      16px    → Large cards, modals
XL:         20px    → Album art
Full:       9999px  → Circular buttons, pills, avatar
```

---

## 11. Responsive Behavior

### 11.1 Component Visibility

| Component | Mobile | Tablet | Desktop |
|-----------|--------|--------|---------|
| Sidebar | Hidden (bottom nav instead) | Hidden (bottom nav) | Visible (240px) |
| Bottom Nav | Visible | Visible | Hidden |
| Queue Panel | Full screen overlay | Slide-in panel | Sidebar (320px) |
| Visualization | Compact (80px) | Medium (120px) | Full (200px) |
| Full Player | Full screen (swipe up) | Full screen (swipe up) | Inline |
| Mini Player | Visible (bottom bar) | Visible (bottom bar) | Part of bottom bar |
| Album Art | 200x200 | 240x240 | 280x280 |
| Freq Analyzer | Hidden | Compact | Full |
| Waveform Scrub | Simplified | Full | Full |

### 11.2 Touch Interactions

| Gesture | Action |
|---------|--------|
| Tap mini player | Expand to full player |
| Swipe down on full player | Collapse to mini player |
| Swipe left on track | Remove from queue |
| Swipe right on track | Add to queue |
| Long press track | Show context menu |
| Pinch on visualization | Toggle fullscreen viz |
| Double tap album art | Like/unlike track |

---

## 12. Accessibility

### 12.1 WCAG 2.1 AA Requirements

- [ ] All interactive elements have visible focus indicators (2px accent ring)
- [ ] Minimum contrast ratio: 4.5:1 (normal text), 3:1 (large text)
- [ ] All buttons have `aria-label` or visible text
- [ ] Player state announced via `aria-live="polite"` region
- [ ] Progress bar has `role="slider"` with `aria-valuenow`, `aria-valuemin`, `aria-valuemax`
- [ ] Volume slider has `role="slider"` with appropriate ARIA attributes
- [ ] Track list has `role="listbox"` with `role="option"` items
- [ ] Current track has `aria-current="true"`
- [ ] Keyboard navigation follows logical tab order
- [ ] Skip to main content link available
- [ ] All images have meaningful alt text
- [ ] Color is not the only indicator of state (icons + color)

### 12.2 Focus Management

```
Tab Order:
1. Skip to content link
2. Navigation (sidebar / bottom nav)
3. Search input (if visible)
4. Main content area (track list)
5. Player controls (left to right)
6. Volume control
7. Queue panel (if open)

Focus Ring Style:
ring-2 ring-accent ring-offset-2 ring-offset-surface-primary
outline: 2px solid #6366F1
outline-offset: 2px
```

### 12.3 Screen Reader Announcements

```
"Now playing: Track Title by Artist Name"
"Paused"
"Resumed"
"Volume set to 80 percent"
"Muted"
"Shuffle enabled"
"Repeat all enabled"
"Track Title added to queue"
```

---

## 13. Loading States

### 13.1 Skeleton Screens

All skeleton elements use:
```
bg-surface-tertiary animate-pulse rounded-md
```

**Track List Skeleton:**
```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ┌────┐  ████████████████      ████   ███  │
│  │    │  ████████████                      │
│  └────┘                                    │
│  ┌────┐  ██████████████████    ████   ███  │
│  │    │  ██████████                        │
│  └────┘                                    │
│  ┌────┐  ████████████          ████   ███  │
│  │    │  ████████████████                  │
│  └────┘                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Album Art Skeleton:**
```
┌──────────────────┐
│                  │
│   animate-pulse  │
│   bg-surface-    │
│   tertiary       │
│   rounded-xl     │
│                  │
└──────────────────┘
```

### 13.2 Loading Indicators

- Track loading: Subtle spinner overlaid on album art
- Audio buffering: Progress bar shows buffer with pulsing animation
- Route transitions: Top-of-page progress bar (NProgress style)
- Data fetching: Skeleton screens (never blank white/black pages)

---

## 14. Error States

### 14.1 Audio Error

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                            │
│           ⚠️  (accent-rose)                │
│                                            │
│     Unable to load this track              │
│     Check your connection and try again    │
│                                            │
│          [ Try Again ]  [ Skip ]           │
│                                            │
└────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 14.2 Empty Playlist

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                            │
│           🎵  (content-tertiary)           │
│                                            │
│        Your queue is empty                 │
│        Add some tracks to get started      │
│                                            │
│          [ Browse Tracks ]                 │
│                                            │
└────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 14.3 Network Error

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                            │
│           📡  (content-tertiary)           │
│                                            │
│        Connection lost                     │
│        Playback will resume when you're    │
│        back online                         │
│                                            │
└────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 15. Design Tokens (CSS Custom Properties)

```css
:root {
  /* Surfaces */
  --surface-primary: #0A0A0F;
  --surface-secondary: #12121A;
  --surface-tertiary: #1A1A28;
  --surface-elevated: #222236;
  --surface-overlay: #2A2A44;

  /* Content */
  --content-primary: #EDEDF0;
  --content-secondary: #A0A0B8;
  --content-tertiary: #6B6B84;
  --content-disabled: #44445C;

  /* Accent */
  --accent: #6366F1;
  --accent-hover: #818CF8;
  --accent-active: #4F46E5;
  --accent-glow: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2);
  --accent-cyan: #22D3EE;
  --accent-emerald: #34D399;
  --accent-rose: #FB7185;
  --accent-amber: #FBBF24;

  /* Borders */
  --border-subtle: #1E1E30;
  --border-default: #2A2A44;
  --border-hover: #3A3A58;
  --border-focus: #6366F1;

  /* Visualization */
  --viz-start: #6366F1;
  --viz-mid: #22D3EE;
  --viz-end: #34D399;

  /* Shadows */
  --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  --shadow-xl: 0 20px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 8px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  --shadow-glow: 0 0 40px rgba(99,102,241,0.15);

  /* Spacing */
  --space-unit: 4px;

  /* Radii */
  --radius-sm: 4px;
  --radius-md: 8px;
  --radius-lg: 12px;
  --radius-xl: 16px;
  --radius-2xl: 20px;
  --radius-full: 9999px;

  /* Transitions */
  --transition-fast: 150ms ease-out;
  --transition-base: 200ms ease-out;
  --transition-slow: 300ms ease-out;
  --transition-spring: 400ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);

  /* Z-index */
  --z-base: 0;
  --z-dropdown: 10;
  --z-sticky: 20;
  --z-overlay: 30;
  --z-modal: 40;
  --z-toast: 50;
  --z-tooltip: 60;

  /* Player */
  --player-height: 80px;
  --sidebar-width: 240px;
  --queue-width: 320px;
}
```
